codeReview.summary: Pass. The prior blocker is resolved at HEAD: interrupted caller-owned injected sandbox sessions no longer serialize sandbox state into durable RunState, because Runner now only persists sandbox state when AgentSandboxRuntime::snapshot() returns Some(...) and snapshot() explicitly returns None for non-runner-owned sessions. The rest of the feature contract still holds in the current code: prepare_sandbox_run() reuses caller-owned LocalSandboxSession instances, live-session manifest updates validate forbidden root/removal/type-replacement changes before applying any workspace mutations, and facade-level sandbox semantics tests cover persistence across runs, manifest-update rejection, and durable-state omission.

summary: Re-reviewed the original failing feature against current HEAD, including the prior fail report, mission metadata, transcript skeleton for worker session f4810ae2-7f77-466b-b824-d760cde01513, the latest handoff, and the relevant commits/diffs (2266730 and 8970a87). The prior blocking issue is fixed, and I did not find any new blocking issues within this feature's scope.
